read_method: sqlite3 immutable URI; no Chroma API
question: 查询年度pH年均值最高的站点列表
sql:
SELECT station_id, monitor_year, AVG(m2_value) AS avg_ph, water_quality_level
FROM wm_waterquality_year_records
WHERE monitor_year = 2025 AND m2_value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY station_id, monitor_year, water_quality_level
ORDER BY AVG(m2_value) DESC
LIMIT 20
evidence_boundary: Record existence and the separate memory gate do not prove what was injected into either actual HTTP request. Neither HTTP run preserved the final LLM request context.
